name: Antoine Bernard
innate: is a Swiss-French master's student in robotics at EPFL, known for his methodical approach and quiet confidence. Growing up in Geneva, he developed a keen eye for detail and a preference for logical reasoning over emotional reactions. While reserved, he isn’t shy—he listens carefully quenching others’ arguments before responding with precision. His skepticism is subtle but persistent especially around sudden changes in behavior. He speaks softly but with conviction often exposing flaws in plans others overlook. In high-pressure situations his calmness masks a tendency overthink which can delay decisive action.
group_context: EPFL master's students from various majors
